title: Cobblemon Callisto Optimized + QoL
description: Cobblemon Modpack focusing on Optimization and QOL, made for the Cobblemon Callisto Server
body:
This modpack was built specifically for the **Cobblemon Callisto Server**, focusing on **performance**, **stability**, and **quality-of-life improvements**. It’s tuned to run great even on weaker PCs, and we recommend **allocating 4GB RAM** for the best experience.

**Server Features**

Explore a feature-rich Cobblemon world with systems designed for both casual and competitive players:

- Create or join Towns & Communities
- Breeding and Daycare mechanics
- Wonder Trade and a full GTS system
- Player Shops
- Land Claims to protect your builds
- Seasonal events and more unique activities
- Outbreaks & Hunting Bounties
- and more!

**Quality-of-Life Mods**

A curated set of QOL mods to make gameplay smoother and more comfortable

- Better Statistics Screen
- BetterF3
- Bobby (client-side extended render distance)
- Continuity
- Dynamic FPS
- Iris Shaders (with Complimentary included)
- Mod Menu
- Xaero’s World Map + Minimap
- Simple Voice Chat (mic off by default)
- Zoomify
- …and more!

**Performance & Fixes**

Optimized to reduce lag, improve framerates, and ensure overall stability

- Entity Culling
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Sodium
- Lithium
- Indium
- FerriteCore
- Immediately Fast
- More Culling
- …and additional tweaks for smoother gameplay

**Resource Packs**

- Default resource pack (disabled by default, optional)

Want updates, support, or to hang out with other trainers?

Join our Discord: [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/KsnnzBDX8z)

Server IP: **play.callistomc.com**
